title: Avobath
description: Guac this way to ultimate softness with a little help from fresh avocado. Take a long soak and let your skin drink up the moisturising goodness of your favourite mashable green fruit.
ingredients: Olea Europaea Fruit Oil (Organic Extra Virgin Olive Oil)
Citrus Aurantium Bergamia Fruit Oil (Bergamot Oil)

images.alt: A bright green, spherical bath bomb called Avobath Bath bomb with a speckled texture. The round top tapers into a faceted base, all set against a solid black background.
The green Avobath Bath bomb sits on the white edge of a bathtub filled with shimmering green water. In the background, lit candles rest on a small wooden stand against a white tiled wall.
Hands hold the bright green Avobath Bath bomb as it fizzes in a tub of pale green water. A stream of frothy, light green bubbles flows from the bomb, with submerged legs visible in the background.
Top-down view of the Avobath Bath bomb dissolving in vibrant green water. A concentrated cluster of frothy, light green bubbles fizzes in the center of the shimmering, lime-colored bathwater.
A close-up view of a hand with a pink and black tip manicure resting gently on the surface of vibrant, turquoise-green bathwater. The white tub's edge is visible.

collections: Our bestselling collection of bathing beauties
Keep Your Cool with Summer Essentials
